report.headline: ST-Segment and T-Wave Abnormalities Detected
report.summary: ST-segment depression or T-wave inversion detected across multiple leads. These changes may reflect ischaemia, electrolyte disturbance, or medication effects and warrant clinical correlation.
report.disclaimer: This output is generated by a research model trained on the PTB-XL dataset. It is not validated for clinical use and must not be used for diagnosis or treatment decisions.
